mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password AS passwordHash, name, phone, sex, id_number AS idNumber, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, version, deleted FROM employee WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.role_name AS roleName, r.sort, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime, r.version, r.deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_employee_role sur ON r.id = sur.role_id WHERE sur.employee_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND sur.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_key FROM employee u JOIN sys_employee_role ur ON u.id = ur.employee_id JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.perm_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1
